task: Remove the erroneous ENV=local dev-header fallback that swallowed Bearer JWTs in PersistentUserProvider.authenticate_and_load_user, restoring correct fall-through to validate_local_jwt.

technical_risk.label: M
technical_risk.risk_factors: Change touches authentication logic (Bearer JWT vs. dev-header precedence) in a security-sensitive code path; red flag applied per guide (authentication/authorization changes bump Technical Risk)
technical_risk.mitigation: Change is a removal of an erroneous fallback that restores previously-correct behavior (not a novel pattern); covered by 3 new unit tests (regression for Bearer JWT fall-through, legacy bare-value convention removal, dev-header precedence); easily revertible single-method diff

key_reasoning.reason: Touches authentication code path (Bearer JWT vs dev-header precedence in PersistentUserProvider); red-flagged per guide even though the fix itself is a small, well-tested removal of erroneous fallback logic
Change is confined to a single method (authenticate_and_load_user) in one class, no new abstractions or cross-layer coordination

red_flags_applied: Technical Risk bumped from S to M: change affects authentication (Bearer JWT / dev-header handling) in PersistentUserProvider.authenticate_and_load_user
